raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Companies are making enormous profits off the sharing, use, and even abuse of consumers' data.",
    "Consumers should have the right to find out what data companies have collected on them.",
    "Privacy for All will require companies to have consumers opt-in for the use and sharing of personal information.",
    "Privacy for All will limit the use of personal information to what consumers would expect based on the service.",
    "Privacy for All will give consumers the right to know how their personal information is being used and who it is being shared with.",
    "Companies can’t charge higher prices or provide inferior service to punish consumers for exercising their privacy rights.",
    "Privacy for All will provide legal recourse so Californians can go to court to force companies to follow the law.",
    "The Pew Research Center reports more than 90 percent of Americans feel they have lost control of their personal information when they go online.",
    "There have been more than 11 billion individual records breached in the U.S. since 2005."
  ]
}
```
